emailContent.subject: Fresh arrivals just dropped 🌱
emailContent.previewText: New season, new favorites — see what's back in stock.
emailContent.body:
Hi there,

We just restocked your favorites and added a few new pieces we think you'll love. Come take a look.

— The team

emailContent.subject: You're on the list ✨
emailContent.body:
Hi there,

As one of our best customers, you get first access to the new collection. Shop now before it opens to everyone.

— The team

emailContent.subject: A sunny sale is coming soon ☀️
emailContent.previewText: Get ready for seasonal favorites at special prices.
emailContent.body:
Hi there,

Our summer sale starts soon, and we wanted to give you an early look at the seasonal favorites that will be included.

— The team
